metadata.sentiment_convention: SIGNED -1.0 to +1.0. Negative < -0.20; Neutral -0.20 to +0.20; Positive > +0.20.
metadata.critical_threshold: Sharp shift >30% for PIR-06; Bersatu sharp-negative = [CRITICAL]; PIR-16 [CRITICAL] if hard-news corroborates 'Bersatu exit imminent?' OR 'sasar bentuk kerajaan' OR viral >50%
metadata.entity_build: DUAL-LAYER ANALYSIS. LAYER 1: entities-20260721-0921.json (midmorning verification, 09:21 MYT, 9 monitoring records, 0 new political entities) — processed as NO-CHANGE CHECKPOINT extending critical threshold to 35th fetch cycle. LAYER 2: Midday raw-scrape cycle (Cycle 7, 09:58 MYT) — HIGH-YIELD ACTIVE CYCLE, 56 files saved (53 automated + 3 manual), 16 genuinely new PRN articles, 37 false positives. This midday content has NOT yet been extracted into entities but directly affects sentiment trajectories of tracked entities. 23 pre-extraction entities identified; 20 existing entities updated from midday content. Extracted entity count: 401 (unchanged from rev26). Pre-extraction entities: 23. Total tracked: 424. 36th consecutive cycle without critical-threshold crossing.

metadata.cycle_assessment: HIGH-YIELD PRE-EXTRACTION CYCLE — The 4-consecutive-silent-cycle streak was BROKEN by the midday (09:58 MYT) fetch cycle which delivered 16 genuinely new PRN articles. Key new intelligence: (1) BN-PN joint machinery now operational at grassroots (Idris Ahmad, PAS VP), (2) PH vulnerability admission — anonymous PH leader tells FMT PH needs 80% turnout, 'even Loke not safe', 2023 win depended on BN alliance, (3) Vote-transfer analysis '25+11 belum tentu 36' — key seats at risk including Aminuddin at Linggi and Loke at Chennah, (4) KJ expands 'isyarat' narrative to Selangor, (5) Derhaka counter by Asyraf Wajdi — UMNO rejects 'if BN wins, Tuanku Muhriz removed' as 'pembodohan rakyat', (6) 6 new candidate confirmations across priority seats. No [CRITICAL] threshold crossing. Next major events: Anwar campaign Wed 22 Jul (Sikamat+Paroi); BN manifesto launch 24 Jul (Linggi+Pertang).

pre_extraction_intelligence.cycle: midday (09:58 MYT 21 Jul) — HIGH-YIELD ACTIVE CYCLE
pre_extraction_intelligence.assessment: The 4-consecutive-silent-cycle streak was BROKEN. The 08:00-10:00 MYT publishing window delivered 16 genuinely new PRN articles across Sinar (4), Utusan (3), FMT EN+BM (5), HarianMetro (2), Awani (2). 3 articles were manually supplemented after discovery via related-links. This content has NOT been extracted into entities yet but directly affects sentiment trajectories of tracked entities. Key narrative developments below.

key_developments.title: BN-PN joint machinery now operational
key_developments.significance: HIGH — First on-the-ground confirmation that BN-PN machinery sharing is operational at grassroots level. Escalates from 'seat arrangement' to 'joint campaign execution.' Idris: 'sudah bermula tetapi secara tidak formal.' Joint house-to-house campaigning with UMNO. Idris hopes cooperation becomes PERMANENT ('sampai matilah'). BN-PAS axis solidifying; Bersatu increasingly isolated.
key_developments.sentiment_impact: Positive for BN-PN cooperation; negative for Bersatu isolation

key_developments.title: PH vulnerability admission (anonymous leader)
key_developments.significance: HIGH — First anonymous PH-leader public admission of electoral vulnerability. PH needs 80% voter turnout to stand chance. 2023 win 'largely because we joined forces with BN.' 'Even Loke Siew Fook is not safe' — his 2,000+ majority was under previous PH-BN arrangement. Young Malays still strongly on PN's side because of PAS. Significant narrative shift — PH internal concern surfacing publicly.
key_developments.sentiment_impact: Negative for PH/Loke; significant PIR-16 narrative development

key_developments.title: Vote-transfer analysis '25+11 belum tentu 36'
key_developments.source: Sinar (UiTM analyst Dr Ariff Aizuddin Azlan)
key_developments.significance: CRITICAL FOR SEAT PROJECTIONS — On paper BN 25 + PN 11 = 36, but formula doesn't guarantee vote transfer. Key seats for BN-PN vote transfer impact: Klawang (N.28), Sikamat (N.13), Ampangan (N.14), Pilah, Labu (N.25), Paroi — ALL PIR-07 priority seats. Simulation: PH could lose majority; Aminuddin at Linggi (N.32) AND Loke at Chennah (N.27) at risk of losing. Johor PRN proved party-identification vote transfer is realizable. UMDAP term withdrawn by Sanusi + Shahidan — signals BN-PN new phase.
key_developments.sentiment_impact: Neutral-to-negative for PH; vote-transfer uncertainty cuts both ways

key_developments.title: KJ expands 'isyarat' narrative to Selangor
key_developments.significance: MODERATE — KJ says BN-PAS NS formula could extend to Selangor if it unites Malay votes. 'Eksperimen politik yang baik.' 'Kalau undi Melayu tak pecah, kita boleh menang Selangor.' NS and Selangor have similar demographics. But KJ stresses BN should NOT exit federal govt now — stability first until PRU. Adds Selangor-extension dimension to 'isyarat' narrative; connects to 'penyatuan undi Melayu' and 'makmal politik' framings.
key_developments.sentiment_impact: Negative for PH (narrative amplification); tempered by KJ's 'BN stays in federal govt' caveat

key_developments.title: Derhaka counter by Asyraf Wajdi Dusuki
key_developments.significance: MODERATE — UMNO Sec-Gen Asyraf Wajdi rejects 'if BN wins, Tuanku Muhriz removed' narrative as 'pembodohan rakyat' (treating voters as stupid). UMNO never interferes in palace affairs, loyal to Yang di-Pertuan Besar. Also rejects racial sentiment campaigning — 'you're already in a government that cooperates.' Counter-narrative that TEMPERS the derhaka framing. New BN candidate: Datuk Mohd Asna Amin (DUN Lenggeng).
key_developments.sentiment_impact: Positive (counter-narrative tempers derhaka); mild positive for BN/UMNO credibility

key_developments.title: PAS 5-seat strategy / 3-seat confidence
key_developments.source: Utusan (PAS VP Mohd Amar Nik Abdullah, 21 Jul 07:51)
key_developments.significance: MODERATE — PAS contests 5 of PN's 11 seats: Serting, Lobak, Ampangan, Paroi, Bagan Pinang. Confident in Serting, Paroi, Bagan Pinang (won PRN 2023). Lobak + Ampangan winnable if BN vote transfer. New candidate: Dr P Kumar (DHPP non-Muslim wing) at DUN Lobak. '3,000 existing + 3,000 from BN understanding.' Paroi (N.25) is director priority seat.
key_developments.sentiment_impact: Positive for PAS/PN; conditional on BN vote transfer

key_developments.title: Gandingan Anwar-Aminuddin = PH true strength
key_developments.source: Sinar (UUM lecturer Dr Mohd Rashdan Sallehuddin, 21 Jul 09:10)
key_developments.significance: MODERATE — UUM analyst: NS will show PH's true strength under Anwar + Aminuddin partnership. PH influence 'sukar dipandang ringan.' PRU14: PH won 20/36. Voters will judge Madani govt performance, economic growth, rising ringgit, PM popularity. Loke: PH targets 23/36 seats (needs 19 for simple majority). Aminuddin: 8 years, no scandals, economic/investment improvements. Counter to Johor UMNO-kubu narrative.

key_developments.title: Federal development investment RM19.1B record
key_developments.significance: LOW-MODERATE — NS recorded highest-ever investment 2025: RM19.1B, 295 projects. Federal spending increased RM4.4B → ~RM6B (2026) under Madani govt. 302 projects, RM1.35B allocation. Key projects: Seremban Sentral TOD, MVV 2.0, Hospital Tuanku Ja'afar 2, Nilai Court, Teluk Kemang Clinic. Reinforces PH governance-delivery narrative.

key_developments.title: 6 new candidate confirmations
key_developments.significance: MODERATE — J Arul Kumar (PH, DUN Nilai N.10 priority), Dr Azizul Hakim Mahdi (PH, DUN Rantau priority — Tok Mat seat), Mohd Umry Abdul Khois (PH, DUN Pertang priority), Datuk Mohd Asna Amin (BN, DUN Lenggeng), Dr P Kumar (PAS DHPP, DUN Lobak), Kamarol Ridzuan Mohd Zain (PN, DUN Paroi priority). All priority/contested seats.
key_developments.sentiment_impact: Neutral (routine confirmations); positive for candidate slate completeness

new_entities.rationale: PAS VP Idris Ahmad confirms BN-PN joint grassroots campaigning has begun — 'sudah bermula tetapi secara tidak formal.' Joint house-to-house with UMNO machinery. Idris hopes it becomes PERMANENT ('sampai matilah'). First on-the-ground confirmation of machinery sharing. Escalates from seat arrangement to joint campaign execution. Positive for BN-PN axis. [PRIORITY] — significant PIR-06 operational development; deepens BN-PN cooperation, isolates Bersatu further.

Anonymous PH coalition leader tells FMT (EN+BM): PH needs 80% voter turnout to stand chance. 2023 win 'largely because we joined forces with BN.' 'Even Loke Siew Fook is not safe' — his 2,000+ majority was under previous PH-BN arrangement. Young Malays still strongly on PN's side because of PAS. First public PH admission of electoral vulnerability. Most significant PIR-16 narrative shift this cycle. [PRIORITY] — significant narrative development; anonymous source (not hard-news threshold corroboration). NOT [CRITICAL] — does not corroborate 'Bersatu exit imminent' or 'sasar bentuk kerajaan.' Watch for amplification.

UiTM political science lecturer Dr Ariff Aizuddin Azlan: on paper BN 25 + PN 11 = 36 but formula doesn't guarantee vote transfer at grassroots. Key seats for BN-PN vote transfer impact: Klawang (N.28), Sikamat (N.13), Ampangan (N.14), Pilah, Labu (N.25), Paroi — ALL PIR-07 priority seats. Simulation: PH could lose majority; Aminuddin at Linggi + Loke at Chennah at risk. Johor PRN proved vote transfer is realizable. UMDAP term withdrawn by Sanusi + Shahidan. [PRIORITY] — directly impacts director's highest-priority seats; analytical (not narrative) framing.

new_entities.entity: Jurang melebar tapi belum retak (Ilham Centre analysis)
new_entities.rationale: Ilham Centre researcher Mujibu Abd Muis: BN-PN understanding widens perception gap between BN and PH. BUT NOT necessarily fracturing the Unity Government — 'logic of elections vs logic of administration.' BN and PH still share interest in federal stability. 'Jurang yang wujud lebih kepada ketegangan politik, bukannya keretakan institusi.' TEMPERS the fracture narrative — redirects tension to BN↔PH, NOT Bersatu↔PN. Does NOT corroborate 'Bersatu exit imminent.' [none] — analytical/opinion piece; tempers rather than escalates.

KJ (Awani/Sinar, 20 Jul 08:30): BN-PAS NS formula could extend to Selangor if it unites Malay votes. 'Eksperimen politik yang baik.' 'Kalau undi Melayu tak pecah, kita boleh menang Selangor.' Reiterates 'isyarat something wrong in Unity Govt.' BUT stresses BN should NOT exit federal govt — stability first until PRU. AMPLIFIES KJ 'isyarat' narrative to national scale (Selangor). [PRIORITY] — significant PIR-16 amplification; connects to 'penyatuan undi Melayu' and 'makmal politik' framings. NOT [CRITICAL] — no hard-news threshold corroboration.

PAS VP Mohd Amar Nik Abdullah: PAS contests 5 of PN's 11 seats (Serting, Lobak, Ampangan, Paroi, Bagan Pinang). Confident in Serting, Paroi, Bagan Pinang (won PRN 2023). Lobak + Ampangan winnable if BN vote transfer. '3,000 existing + 3,000 from BN understanding.' Paroi (N.25) is director priority seat. [PRIORITY] — Paroi confidence directly impacts PIR-07 priority seat.

Awani coverage of Aminuddin manifesto launch speech: urges voters to choose stability + governance record, reject 'politik percaturan kuasa' (power-brokering politics). 'Bukan janji kosong, bukan retorik indah didengar tetapi sukar dilaksanakan. Kami datang dengan rekod, dengan hasil.' Reinforces PH stability frame. [PRIORITY] — core PIR-16 stability narrative; counter to BN-PN 'percaturan' framing.

UMNO Sec-Gen Asyraf Wajdi Dusuki (Utusan, 21 Jul 08:04): rejects 'if BN wins, Tuanku Muhriz removed' narrative as 'pembodohan rakyat.' UMNO never interferes in palace affairs, loyal to Yang di-Pertuan Besar + Undang Yang Empat. References Johor 'Najib bebas' precedent. Also rejects racial sentiment campaigning. Counter-narrative that TEMPERS derhaka framing. [PRIORITY] — directly counters PIR-07 derhaka friction at Pertang; connects to director's derhaka watch.

new_entities.entity: Datuk Idris Ahmad (PAS VP, BN-PN machinery)
new_entities.rationale: PAS VP confirms BN-PN joint grassroots campaigning operational. Visited Port Dickson + Bagan Pinang (20 Jul). 'Optik' of cooperation 'amat jelas.' Hopes cooperation becomes permanent. [PRIORITY] — key PIR-06 operational figure.

new_entities.entity: Datuk Muhammad Nazri Kassim (PH, Ampangan N.14)
new_entities.rationale: PH Ampangan (N.14) candidate: flood control achievements as campaign narrative. River maintenance since 2022, federal RTB project RM101 million (Sungai Linggi basin Phase 5). Flood incidents decreasing. Incumbent showcasing governance delivery. [PRIORITY] — N.14 is director priority seat (defector-framing watch).
PH candidate for DUN Nilai (N.10, Tier-4 priority, 5-cornered fight). Routine confirmation.
PH candidate for DUN Rantau (Tok Mat's seat, straight fight). Candidate confirmation for priority seat.
PH candidate for DUN Pertang (N.02, CRITICAL seat, derhaka friction context). [PRIORITY] — Pertang is CRITICAL seat.
BN candidate for DUN Lenggeng. Announced at Asyraf Wajdi ceramah. Routine confirmation.
PAS Dewan Himpunan Pendukong PAS (DHPP non-Muslim wing) candidate for DUN Lobak. PAS giving space to non-Muslim candidates. Routine confirmation.
PN candidate for DUN Paroi (N.25, Tier-4 priority). Confirmed at PN Paroi grand ceramah (20 Jul night). [PRIORITY] — Paroi is director priority seat.
Ilham Centre fellow researcher providing analytical assessment of BN-PH gap. 'Jurang melebar tapi belum retak.' Neutral analyst perspective.
UiTM political science lecturer. Vote-transfer analysis: '25+11 belum tentu 36.' Analytical perspective on BN-PN vote transfer uncertainty.
UUM lecturer. 'Gandingan Anwar-Aminuddin serlah kekuatan sebenar PH.' Positive analyst assessment of PH strength.
PAS DG Sanusi Md Nor + PN Perlis chair Shahidan Kassim withdraw 'UMDAP' term per Asyraf Wajdi request. Signals BN-PN relationship entering new phase. Positive rapprochement signal.
NS recorded highest-ever investment 2025: RM19.1B, 295 projects. Federal spending RM4.4B → ~RM6B (2026), 302 projects, RM1.35B allocation. Reinforces PH governance-delivery narrative.

new_entities.entity: Mohd Nassuruddin Daud (Kelantan MB, Paroi ceramah)
new_entities.rationale: Kelantan MB appeared at PN Paroi grand ceramah (20 Jul night). PAS state-leader campaign surrogate.

new_entities.entity: Penganalisis cadang pembubaran awal tak beri penggal baharu
new_entities.rationale: FMT analyst piece arguing early dissolution doesn't guarantee new term. Electoral reform analysis perspective.

Penganalisis cadang pembubaran awal tak beri penggal baharu

PDM Klawang shutdown/reopen.notes: No new mention. Police investigation maintained.

MCA rebuttal to Loke.notes: No new development. Wee responded in prior cycle.

Derhaka Pertang friction.notes: UMNO Sec-Gen Asyraf Wajdi rejects 'if BN wins, Tuanku Muhriz removed' as 'pembodohan rakyat.' Counter-narrative TEMPERS derhaka framing. MCMC 3R enforcement (2-outlet) still active. Score -0.22→-0.20 (marginal improvement).

Lebih hebat new coalition.notes: 36th cycle, no formalization. Bersatu increasingly isolated but no formal new-coalition entity.

RoS complaint disrupting PN seat negotia.notes: Seat allocation stable. BN 25 + PN 11 = 36 confirmed.

Bersatu exit imminent.notes: 36th cycle. 'Jurang melebar tapi belum retak' redirects tension to BN↔PH, NOT Bersatu↔PN. Bersatu 24 solo-logo candidates STABLE. Narrative losing traction (improving from -0.75 to -0.70).

sasar bentuk kerajaan negeri.notes: 36th cycle. [CRITICAL] NOT crossed. PH 36 solo structurally clear; no explicit hard-news headline. PH vulnerability admission weakens confidence.

BN manifesto launch 24 Jul DUN Linggi.notes: Not yet occurred — next major PIR-07 event (3 days away).

PH manifesto launch 20 Jul evening.notes: Fully covered across Awani + FMT EN/BM + Harian Metro + Sinar.

Hamzah toxic PN volley.notes: No new Hamzah/Marzuki volley. Carried forward.

Fahmi-KJ exchange.notes: FMT EN+BM + Sinar + Awani (Selangor extension). No KJ counter-response to Fahmi's 'don't go overboard' yet. Watch for escalation.

G Manivanan / DUN Jeram Padang.notes: PH candidate confirmed via Sinar body text. 4-cornered fight.

Anwar campaign Wed 22 Jul.notes: Sikamat (N.13) + Paroi (N.25). Not yet occurred — tomorrow.

BN-PN joint machinery.notes: PAS VP Idris Ahmad confirms joint grassroots campaigning begun. 'Sampai matilah' — hopes permanent. First on-the-ground confirmation.

PH vulnerability admission.notes: Anonymous PH leader: 'even Loke not safe,' 80% turnout needed, 2023 win depended on BN. First public PH vulnerability admission. Watch for amplification.

Vote-transfer analysis.notes: '25+11 belum tentu 36.' Key seats at risk: Klawang, Sikamat, Ampangan, Pilah, Labu, Paroi. Aminuddin at Linggi + Loke at Chennah at risk.

pir_06_critical.assessment: NOT CROSSED. No formal PN-MT expulsion notice. No Bersatu candidate withdrawal (24 solo-logo candidates STABLE). No Kiandee quorum escalation. No 'lebih hebat' formalization. No RoS action. BN-PN cooperation DEEPENING (machinery sharing now operational) — opposite of Bersatu exit. 'Jurang melebar tapi belum retak' frames tension as BN↔PH, NOT Bersatu↔PN. Bersatu increasingly isolated as BN-PAS axis solidifies, but this is structural marginalization, not formal expulsion/withdrawal. No sharp >30% shift for any PIR-06 entity (Bersatu -0.90→-0.92 = 2.2%; all others unchanged). Bersatu sharp-negative alert is pre-existing (stable at critical); marginal deepening, not a fresh sharp-negative signal.
pir_06_critical.sharp_shift_details: No PIR-06 entity shows >30% change. Bersatu -0.90→-0.92 (2.2%); BN-PN merged machinery +0.60→+0.65 (8.3%); all others unchanged or marginal.

pir_16_critical.assessment: NOT CROSSED. No hard-news corroboration of 'Bersatu exit imminent?' — narrative actively downplayed/redirected by 'jurang melebar tapi belum retak' (Ilham Centre). No hard-news corroboration of 'sasar bentuk kerajaan negeri' — PH solo structurally clear but no explicit headline. PH vulnerability admission (anonymous leader, FMT) is the closest to a critical narrative shift — PH publicly acknowledging 'even Loke not safe' — but does NOT cross the CRITICAL threshold (anonymous source; not hard-news corroboration of the specific threshold events). KJ 'isyarat' narrative stable but expanding to Selangor (Awani/Sinar) — adds national dimension. Fahmi-KJ exchange stable (4 outlets including KJ Selangor extension; no KJ counter-response yet). Viral amplification >50%: Fahmi-KJ 3→4 outlets = 33% outlet-count increase (not >50%); normal cross-outlet propagation, not viral escalation.
pir_16_critical.viral_amplification_details: Fahmi-KJ 3→4 outlets = 33% increase (not >50%). KJ Selangor extension adds a new dimension but is the same story, not a new viral narrative. PH vulnerability admission is 1 story across FMT EN+BM (2 outlets) — not viral.

pir_07_critical.assessment: No incumbent/leading candidate sentiment drop >20% detected. Aminuddin Harun +0.58→+0.55 (5.2% decline — well within threshold). Loke +0.43→+0.30 (30.2% decline — BUT Loke is PIR-16 tagged, not PIR-07; the >20% drop rule applies to PIR-07 seat-level candidates). DUN Linggi +0.28→+0.22 (21.4% decline — marginally above 20% threshold for a CRITICAL seat; flagged for monitoring). DUN Paroi +0.12→+0.05 (58% decline — BUT both scores are in neutral range; the absolute shift is 0.07, which is marginal). DUN Sikamat +0.12→+0.08 (33% decline — BUT absolute shift is 0.04, marginal). Derhaka friction at Pertang COUNTERED by Asyraf Wajdi (tempers, not intensifies). No defector-framing intensification at N.14.
pir_07_critical.seat_drop_alert: DUN Linggi (N.32) +0.28→+0.22 = 21.4% decline — marginally above the >20% threshold. This is the MB's flagship challenge seat (CRITICAL). Vote-transfer analysis identifies it as at-risk. Flagged for priority monitoring. However, absolute shift (0.06) is small; both scores remain in positive range.

next_cycle_watch: Anwar campaign Wed 22 Jul (Sikamat N.13 + Paroi N.25) — first PM ground-campaign; coverage tone; could shift 'fleeing Sikamat' narrative
BN manifesto launch 24 Jul (DUN Linggi N.32 + Pertang N.02) — next major PIR-07 milestone; BN-PN joint or BN-only framing?
KJ counter-response to Fahmi's 'don't go overboard' rebuttal — does the 'isyarat' narrative escalate further now that it's 4-outlet?
PH vulnerability admission amplification — does the 'even Loke not safe' framing propagate beyond FMT? Watch for viral >50%
Entity extraction of midday raw-scrapes — 16 genuinely new PRN articles await formal extraction; 23 pre-extraction entities identified in this analysis
BN-PN joint machinery — does Idris Ahmad's 'sampai matilah' permanence hope signal a structural shift? Does Bersatu react to its isolation?
Vote-transfer at key seats — do BN-PN vote-transfer rates materialize at Klawang, Sikamat, Ampangan, Paroi?
Derhaka counter — does Asyraf Wajdi's 'pembodohan rakyat' counter effectively neutralize the derhaka narrative at Pertang?
3R investigation — does the MCMC investigation (individual summoned to IPD Seremban) produce charges?
